howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to your online store.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Create a free account in 30 seconds. No credit card required.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Add products, choose a design and set up payments.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Share the link and start accepting orders from customers.

features.title: Everything you need
features.subtitle: Features that help your business grow online.
features.aiDescriptions_desc: Automatically generated product descriptions using AI. Save hours of writing.
features.aiTranslation_desc: Write in any language — AI translates your store content to the shop language. One click, whole store translated.
features.multilang_desc: Store in Slovak, Czech, Ukrainian, German and English — automatically.
features.payments_desc: Accept card payments via Stripe, PayPal or local payment gateways.
features.whatsapp_desc: Customers contact you directly via WhatsApp. Orders and chat in one place.
features.mobile_desc: Your store looks great on every device — phone, tablet and computer.
features.analytics_desc: Track sales, traffic and conversions in real time.
features.security_desc: SSL certificate, GDPR compliance and secure payments free for every store.
features.customDomain_desc: Connect your own domain or use a free vendshop.shop subdomain.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start for free. Pay only when your business grows.
pricing.free_desc: For beginners who want to try the platform.
pricing.starter_desc: For growing businesses that need more.
pricing.pro_desc: For professionals who want the maximum.

testimonials.title: What our users say
testimonials.subtitle: Real feedback from entrepreneurs who chose VendShop.
testimonials.testimonial1: I set up my bakery shop in 15 minutes. Orders started coming the same day! The AI descriptions saved me hours of work.
testimonials.testimonial2: Finally a simple platform for my repair service. Customers find me online and book directly. Highly recommended!
testimonials.testimonial3: Beautiful design, easy to manage. My beauty salon website looks professional and I didn't need a developer.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about VendShop.
faq.q1: How much does it cost to create a store?
faq.a1: You can start completely free. Paid plans start from €12/month and include a custom domain, more products and advanced features.
faq.a2: No. VendShop is designed for people without technical skills. You can create a store in minutes using a simple editor.
faq.q3: What payment methods do you support?
faq.a3: We support Stripe, PayPal and bank transfers. In SK/CZ we also support card payments via local payment gateways.
faq.q4: Can I use my own domain?
faq.a4: Yes! On Starter and Pro plans you can connect your own domain. On the Free plan you get a vendshop.shop subdomain.
faq.a5: Yes, VendShop supports selling digital products — e-books, courses, templates and other downloadable files.
faq.q6: How long does it take to create a store?
faq.a6: You can create a basic store in 5 minutes. Adding products and setting up the design usually takes 1-2 hours.
faq.q7: I don't speak the local language. Can I still create a store?
faq.a7: Yes! Write your content in any language and use our AI translation feature to translate everything to the shop language in one click. Free plan includes one translation, paid plans offer unlimited translations.

dashboardSettings.deleteStoreDesc: Permanently delete this store including all products and orders. This action cannot be undone.
dashboardSettings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this store and all its data? Type the store name to confirm.
dashboardSettings.bannerHint: Wide image displayed in the hero section. Recommended 1600×600 px.
dashboardSettings.logoHint: JPG, PNG or WEBP, max 5 MB. Square recommended.
dashboardSettings.quickBadgesHint: Select badges to show on your shop page. Customers will see them below the hero section.
dashboardSettings.addressHint: Enter your physical address. Click 'Find on map' to show a map on your shop page.
dashboardSettings.workingHoursHint: Set your working hours for each day. Customers will see an 'Open' or 'Closed' status.
dashboardSettings.openingHoursTextHint: Optional plain text fallback, e.g. Mon–Fri 9:00–18:00
dashboardSettings.orderAcceptanceHint: Limit the time window when customers can place online orders.
dashboardSettings.translateBulkDesc: Translate all your store content (description, about, products) to the shop language with AI in one click.
dashboardSettings.translateBulkUsed: You've already used your free AI translation. Upgrade to Starter or Pro for unlimited translations.

dashboardSettings.descriptionPlaceholder: Short description shown in the hero section...
dashboardSettings.customDomainDesc: Connect your own domain to this store. Available for Starter and Pro plans.
dashboardSettings.customDomainDnsStep1: Go to your domain registrar (e.g. Websupport, GoDaddy, Namecheap)
dashboardSettings.customDomainDnsStep2: Add a CNAME record for your domain:
dashboardSettings.customDomainDnsStep3: Wait 5–30 minutes for DNS propagation, then click 'Verify DNS'
dashboardSettings.customDomainUpgrade: Upgrade to Starter or Pro to connect your own domain
